name: pythia-sim
description: Run standalone Pythia 8 simulations through a local stdio MCP server.

settings.name: Pythia Root
settings.description: Absolute path to a configured standalone Pythia 8 checkout. Set this for the simplest single-root installation.

settings.name: Pythia Root Alias
settings.description: Optional alias for the single-root setup defined by PYTHIA_SIM_ROOT. Defaults to "default" when omitted.

settings.name: Registry Path
settings.description: Optional path to a roots.json registry file for multi-root setups. This takes precedence over PYTHIA_SIM_ROOT.

settings.name: State Directory
settings.description: Optional directory for run state, private snapshots, failed-run artifacts, and downloaded vendor builds.
